risk_assessment.mitigation_notes: Repair estimate is medium-confidence; recommend formal inspection before contract execution

memo_content.executive_summary: Opportunity to acquire 1234 N Oak St, Spokane, WA 99201 at $160,000 (56% of ARV). Property has strong equity position (62%), high motivation score (8), and two distress signals (tax delinquent, absentee owner). Projected profit of $90,000 after $35,000 in repairs.
memo_content.recommendation: PROCEED with offer at $160,000. Strong equity position and multiple distress signals indicate motivated seller. Recommend formal inspection before closing.
next_steps: Prepare assignment contract if wholesale exit
Notify legal for RCW 18.85 compliance review
